## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] `docs/SmartCrop_PDF_Specification_Web.md` updated first, if this changes user-visible behavior
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` passes (if the change touches DOM/canvas/worker behavior)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or copyrighted fixture content included
